originalTitle: New Zealand v Belgium: World Cup 2026 – live
summary: Minute-by-minute report : The bottom Group G teams are fighting for the chance to progress in Vancouver. Join Sam Lewis for updates
content: Hello and welcome to the final match day of Group G with New Zealand taking on Belgium at BC Place in Vancouver. Kick-off for today’s match will be 8:00pm local time (11pm EDT/4am BST/1pm AEST). This is the third and final match of Group G, with all four teams playing simultaneously to see who will qualify out of one of the tightest groups of this World Cup. As it stands, just three points separate first from fourth, with Egypt (4) leading the group followed closely by Iran (2), Belgium (2), and New Zealand (1). While a number of other fourth-placed teams have entered this final match day already eliminated thanks to Fifa’s new head-to-head ruling, there is still a ray of hope for New Zealand. Their opening 2-2 draw against Iran, combined with Belgium’s two draws in their first two matches, means a win for the All Whites today could see them leapfrog the world number 10 and qualify for their first ever World Cup knock-outs. Belgium, for their part, currently sit outside the best-ranked third-placed teams after two disappointing performances against Egypt (1-1) and Iran (0-0). They will be particularly frustrated by their performance against Iran last week, which saw Nathan Ngoy receive a straight red card and a side stacked with stars fail to get past the stand-out Alireza Beiranvand in goal. All of which is to say that both teams need a win today (though Belgium could settle for another draw) to progress to the round of 32. Elsewhere, Egypt are also taking on Iran in Seattle to determine who could top the group and thus secure an easier opponent in the next stage. Jonathan Howcroft is leading that live blog here if you’d like to follow along with both.
chineseTitle: 新西兰 vs 比利时：2026 年世界杯 – 直播
chineseSummary: 详细报道：G组垫底球队正在温哥华争夺晋级机会。加入 Sam Lewis 获取最新动态
chineseContent: 大家好，欢迎来到 G 组的最后一场比赛，新西兰队将在温哥华 BC Place 迎战比利时队。今天的比赛将于当地时间晚上 8:00 开始（东部夏令时间晚上 11 点/英国夏令时凌晨 4 点/澳大利亚东部时间下午 1 点）。这是 G 组的第三场也是最后一场比赛，所有四支球队同时进行比赛，看看谁能从本届世界杯最激烈的小组之一中脱颖而出。目前，第一名和第四名仅相差 3 分，埃及（4）在小组中领先，伊朗（2）、比利时（2）和新西兰（1）紧随其后。尽管由于国际足联新的交锋裁决，进入最后比赛日的其他一些第四名球队已经被淘汰，但新西兰队仍然存在一线希望。他们首场2-2战平伊朗，再加上比利时在前两场比赛中两场平局，意味着全白队今天的胜利可能会让他们超越世界排名第十，并首次晋级世界杯淘汰赛。就比利时而言，在对阵埃及（1-1）和伊朗（0-0）的两场令人失望的表现后，目前排在排名最好的第三名球队之外。他们对上周对阵伊朗队的表现尤其感到沮丧，内森·恩戈伊直接被红牌罚下，而这支众星云集的球队却未能超越门将阿里雷扎·贝兰万德。所有这些都表明，两队今天都需要一场胜利（尽管比利时可能会再打一场平局）才能晋级 32 强。此外，埃及还将在西雅图迎战伊朗，以确定谁能小组第一，从而在下一阶段找到一个更轻松的对手。如果您想关注的话，乔纳森·豪克罗夫特 (Jonathan Howcroft) 正在领导这个实时博客。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
